name: get_bels
short_description: Get a list of bels. If a design is loaded, gets the constructed site type bels.
full_help:
get_bels

Description: 
Get a list of bels. If a design is loaded, gets the constructed site type bels.

Syntax: 
get_bels  [-regexp] [-nocase] [-filter <arg>] [-of_objects <args>]
          [-include_routing_bels] [-include_routethru_bels] [-net_segment_only]
          [-quiet] [-verbose] [<patterns>]

Returns: 
bels

Usage: 
  Name                       Description
  --------------------------------------
  [-regexp]                  Patterns are full regular expressions
  [-nocase]                  Perform case-insensitive matching. (valid only 
                             when -regexp specified)
  [-filter]                  Filter list with expression
  [-of_objects]              Get the bels of these slr, tiles, sites, cells, 
                             clock_regions, nets or pseudo pips.
  [-include_routing_bels]    Also look for and include matching rbels.
  [-include_routethru_bels]  Also look for and include routethru bels
  [-net_segment_only]        Only look for the given net segment.
  [-quiet]                   Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]                 Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<patterns>]               Match bels against patterns
                             Default: *

Categories: 
Device, Object, XDC

arguments.description: Perform case-insensitive matching. (valid only when -regexp specified)
